## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

List the modules, commands, workflows, or documentation areas affected.

## Validation

Describe the local checks performed and any relevant output.

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build Reckonry.sln` passes.
- [ ] `dotnet test Reckonry.sln` passes.
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed.
- [ ] ADR updated if architecture changed.
- [ ] No real financial data committed.
- [ ] No invented financial values added to tests, docs, samples, or generated output.
- [ ] No tax interpretation added without an official source.
- [ ] Privacy reviewed for logs, samples, screenshots, fixtures, and release artifacts.
- [ ] Breaking changes include migration or compatibility notes.

## Financial Data And Privacy

Confirm that all examples, tests, samples, logs, screenshots, and attached files are fake, synthetic, or anonymized.

## Tax And Regulatory Sources

For country-specific tax behavior or reporting changes, list the official sources used. If not applicable, write `None`.

## Migration Notes

Describe migration steps for breaking changes, or write `None`.
